description: Create a specialized surveillance layout named 'Lobby POS Monitor' for the 'Lobby Camera' consisting of two views of the same camera side-by-side. The first view must show the full default zoom, while the second view must be a fixed digital zoom on the bottom-right quadrant (X: 0.5, Y: 0.5, Width: 0.5, Height: 0.5) to focus on the counter area. Access the system via the Nx Witness REST API at https://localhost:7001 using credentials admin/Admin1234!.
